sections.01:
This privacy notice has been prepared by Yiğit Çelik Kapı ("DATA CONTROLLER") pursuant to Article 10 of Turkish Law No. 6698 on the Protection of Personal Data ("THE LAW"), to inform data subjects about the processing of personal data collected through the website https://yigitcelikkapi.com.tr/.

The DATA CONTROLLER exercises the utmost care to ensure that personal data is processed lawfully, protected and kept secure.
sections.02:
Our website contains only an order form and a contact form. By completing these forms, the user is deemed to have accepted the privacy policy.

When forms are submitted, the information is sent directly to the company's Hotmail email address.

Information Collected

Name, surname, telephone number, email address, customer note and order information

Purpose of Use

This information is used solely to contact the customer and manage the order process

Your personal data is processed for the following purposes:

  • Contacting the customer
  • Managing the order process
  • Evaluating and responding to quote requests
  • Evaluating requests and complaints
  • Fulfilling legal obligations
sections.03:
Your personal data is retained until the customer requests deletion. Upon the customer's request, the data is deleted without delay.

Important: Statutory retention periods for legal obligations (such as invoice records) also apply separately. Under the Turkish Tax Procedure Law and Turkish Commercial Code, commercial records and documents must be retained for 10 years.
sections.04:
No cookies are collected on our website for any purpose. Users' personal data is not processed through cookies.

If cookies are used in the future, a cookie management panel will be provided to users with the ability to customise preferences.
sections.05:
Information submitted through user forms is processed via Microsoft's Hotmail email service.

Because Hotmail servers may be located outside Türkiye, cross-border transfer of data may occur. This is stated explicitly and, where required, the user's explicit consent is obtained.

Under Article 9 of KVKK, the explicit consent of the data subject is obtained for cross-border data transfers, or one of the other conditions set out in KVKK is sought. Microsoft complies with international data protection standards.
sections.06:
Under Article 11 of KVKK, as data subjects you have the following rights:

To learn whether your personal data is being processed

To request deletion, correction or cessation of processing of your data

To learn the purpose of processing and whether data is used in accordance with that purpose

To know the third parties to whom data has been transferred domestically or abroad

To request compensation for damage suffered as a result of unlawful processing

How to apply: For these requests you may use the contact form or the company email address (info@yigitcelikkapi.com.tr).
sections.07:
To exercise your rights under KVKK, you may submit your applications through the following methods:

Email info@yigitcelikkapi.com.tr
Post Karpuzsekisi Mah. 34. Cad. No:24 Hacılar / Kayseri / Türkiye
Telephone +90 352 311 55 41

Your applications will be concluded free of charge within 30 (thirty) days at the latest, depending on the nature of the request. However, if the process requires an additional cost, the fee set out in the tariff determined by the Personal Data Protection Authority may be charged.
sections.08:
Yiğit Çelik Kapı San. Tic. Ltd. Şti.

Address: Karpuzsekisi Mah. 34. Cad. No:24 Hacılar / Kayseri / Türkiye
Telephone: +90 352 311 55 41
Email: info@yigitcelikkapi.com.tr
Website: https://yigitcelikkapi.com.tr/

sections.01:
Yiğit Çelik Kapı ("the Company") is committed to protecting the privacy and security of personal data obtained through the website https://yigitcelikkapi.com.tr/.

This privacy policy explains the principles governing the processing of personal data under Turkish Law No. 6698 on the Protection of Personal Data ("KVKK").

The security of your personal data is a priority for us. All your data is collected over encrypted connections and stored on secure servers.
sections.02:
Our website contains only an order form and a contact form. When forms are submitted, the information is sent directly to the company's Hotmail email address.

Information Collected
Name, surname, telephone number, email address, customer note and order information
Purpose of Use
This information is used solely to contact the customer and manage the order process

Personal data collected is processed for the following purposes:

Customer Communication

Contacting the customer

Order Process

Managing the order process

Price Quotes

Evaluating quote requests

Legal Obligations

Fulfilling legal obligations
sections.03:
Data is retained until the customer requests deletion. Upon the customer's request, the data is deleted without delay.

Important: Statutory retention periods for legal obligations (such as invoice records) also apply separately. Under the Turkish Tax Procedure Law and Turkish Commercial Code, commercial records and documents must be retained for 10 years.
sections.04:
Information submitted through user forms is processed via Microsoft's Hotmail email service.

Because Hotmail servers may be located outside Türkiye, cross-border transfer of data may occur. This is stated explicitly and, where required, the user's explicit consent is obtained.

Under Article 9 of KVKK, the explicit consent of the data subject is obtained for cross-border data transfers, or one of the other conditions set out in KVKK is sought. Microsoft complies with international data protection standards.
sections.05:
No cookies are collected on our website for any purpose. Users' personal data is not processed through cookies.

If cookies are used in the future, a cookie management panel will be provided to users with the ability to customise preferences.
sections.06:
Under KVKK, users have the following rights:

1

Request Deletion of Data

You have the right to request deletion of your personal data

2

Request Correction of Data

You have the right to request correction of incomplete or inaccurate data

3

Request Cessation of Processing

You have the right to request that processing of your personal data be stopped

How to apply: For these requests you may use the contact form or the company email address (info@yigitcelikkapi.com.tr).
sections.07:
You may send your requests under KVKK through the following contact channels:

Email

info@yigitcelikkapi.com.tr

Website

yigitcelikkapi.com.tr

Telephone

+90 352 311 55 41
sections.08:

Address Karpuzsekisi Mah. 34. Cad. No:24 Hacılar / Kayseri / Türkiye

sections.01:
These terms of use apply to all visitors to the website https://yigitcelikkapi.com.tr/.

Anyone who begins using the site is deemed to have accepted the conditions set out below. If you do not accept these conditions, please do not use the site.

These terms of use set out your rights and obligations in relation to use of the site. Please read them carefully.
sections.02:
Yiğit Çelik Kapı operates this site to present its products and services, provide information and facilitate communication.

For Information Only

Site content is for information purposes and does not constitute a binding commitment

Product Catalogue

Product information, images and technical specifications are provided for promotional purposes

Communication Platform

Used to communicate with customers and receive requests

Important: Information on the site does not constitute a formal offer or contract. Please contact us for final prices and terms.
sections.03:
By using the site, you agree to comply with the following rules:

Unlawful Use Prohibited

You may not use the site for unlawful purposes or misuse

Infringement of Rights Prohibited

You may not share content that infringes the rights of others

Security Breach Prohibited

You may not take actions that compromise site security

Spam and Misuse Prohibited

You may not share content containing spam, viruses or malicious software
sections.04:
The order and contact forms on the Yiğit Çelik Kapı website may be used solely to receive customer requests, manage order processes and communicate with customers.

These Forms Must Not Be Used for the Following Purposes:

  • Advertising, promotional or marketing content
  • Malicious, misleading or false information
  • Hacking attempts, malicious software or content that threatens system security
  • Other purposes unrelated to the Company's activities

Important: If such use is detected, legal action may be initiated against the person or entity concerned. The Turkish Penal Code and relevant legislation apply.
sections.05:
All content on the site (text, images, logo, trademark, design, software, etc.) belongs to Yiğit Çelik Kapı and is protected by intellectual property rights.

Copyright

All content is protected by copyright

Trademark Rights

The logo and brand are registered trademarks

Image Rights

Product images and photographs are protected

Prohibited Uses

  • Copying, reproducing or distributing without permission
  • Commercial use
  • Modification or creation of derivative works
  • Publishing on other websites
sections.06:
Yiğit Çelik Kapı makes every effort to ensure that information on the site is current and accurate, but cannot be held liable in the following circumstances:

1

Technical Errors: Server failures, connection problems or technical disruptions

2

Interruptions: Outages caused by maintenance, updates or unforeseen circumstances

3

Currency of Information: Possible delays or changes in product information

4

Third-Party Links: Content and security of external links

5

User Errors: Incorrect information entry or user-related problems

The site is provided "as is". Yiğit Çelik Kapı does not guarantee uninterrupted or error-free operation of the site.
sections.07:
Our website contains only an order form and a contact form. By completing these forms, the user is deemed to have accepted the privacy policy.

When forms are submitted, the information is sent directly to the company's Hotmail email address. Information collected (name, surname, telephone, email, customer note and order information) is used solely to contact the customer and manage the order process.

Data Retention Period

Data is retained until the customer requests deletion. Upon the customer's request, the data is deleted without delay. Statutory retention periods for legal obligations (such as invoice records) also apply separately.

Cross-Border Data Transfers

Information submitted through user forms is processed via Microsoft's Hotmail email service. Because Hotmail servers may be located outside Türkiye, cross-border transfer of data may occur. This is stated explicitly and, where required, the user's explicit consent is obtained.
sections.07b:
No cookies are collected on our website for any purpose. Users' personal data is not processed through cookies.

If cookies are used in the future, a cookie management panel will be provided to users with the ability to customise preferences.

For details on how your personal data is processed:

Privacy Policy

Learn how your personal data is protected

Personal Data Protection Notice (KVKK)

Review details of personal data processing
sections.08:
Yiğit Çelik Kapı reserves the right to update these terms of use at any time.

Right to Update

Terms may be updated without prior notice

Effect

Updated terms take effect as soon as they are published

User Responsibility

Users should review the terms regularly

Continued use of the site after an update means you accept the new terms.
sections.09:
The following provisions apply to the resolution of disputes arising from these terms of use:

Governing Law

Turkish law applies

Competent Court

Courts and enforcement offices in Kayseri have jurisdiction
sections.10:
For any questions or requests, you may contact us:

Yiğit Çelik Kapı San. Tic. Ltd. Şti.

Karpuzsekisi Mah. 34. Cad. No:24 Hacılar / Kayseri / Türkiye
+90 352 311 55 41
info@yigitcelikkapi.com.tr
https://yigitcelikkapi.com.tr/
